title: taraxacum formosum
intro: Taraxacum formosum, also known as the Asian dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum formosum include its ability to support liver function, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
